records.title: Gross gaming revenue margin
records.summary: Track GGR margin (turnover minus winnings paid) by sport, bet type, and channel to monitor trading performance.
records.metric_definition: Total wagering turnover minus customer winnings, divided by turnover.
records.methodology_note: Segment by fixed-odds sports, racing, and in-play; exclude promotional free bets from turnover.

records.title: Player yield and lifetime value
records.summary: Measure net revenue per active player and projected LTV by acquisition cohort and channel to optimize marketing spend.
records.metric_definition: Net gaming revenue divided by average active players; LTV is discounted projected yield over expected player tenure.

records.title: Responsible gambling controls
records.summary: Implement proactive harm-minimization measures including deposit limits, loss limits, session time alerts, and AI-driven early intervention for at-risk players.

records.title: Anti-money laundering and integrity controls
records.summary: Deploy transaction monitoring, identity verification, and suspicious betting pattern detection aligned with financial crime prevention standards.

records.title: Personalization within responsible gambling guardrails
records.summary: Drive customer engagement and yield through personalized offers and content while enforcing spend limits and harm-minimization triggers.

records.title: Real-time trading and risk management
records.summary: Leverage real-time data feeds, ML pricing models, and automated liability management to optimize in-play margins and reduce exposure.

records.title: Operate on streaming bet placement and odds data for real-time trading risk
records.summary: Prioritize use cases that consume live bet placement streams and odds movements for real-time trading risk management — liability monitoring, market suspension triggers, and margin protection — rather than post-event settlement analytics alone.

records.title: Embed responsible gambling thresholds as constraints in player targeting
records.summary: Prefer use cases that build responsible gambling indicators — deposit velocity, loss-chasing patterns, session duration alerts — as first-class constraints on marketing and promotional targeting models rather than separate compliance afterthoughts.
